comment.body:
"This is a clear setup for a rangebound inbetween the pivotal levels (see below).
The centroid range falls at 6281.83 - 6292.20

comment.body:
My definition is regarding the word 'trap'
As if the bulls pile in, but either some rug pull happens overnight so they can't get out or during the day. 
A healthy pullback isn't a trap to me
